title: The Watcher
description: A psychological game of voyeurism and boundaries. Just watching him is enough to pull you under.

title: Burning Barcelona
description: Two best friends in a sunlit Barcelona room find themselves unable to resist each other.

title: JAOfilm No.10
description: When the outside fades, the wild within awakens. Desire is primal, a raw instinct and a passion that draws them closer.

title: JAOfilm No.9
description: That sultry heat between friends and lovers, amid Taiwan's humid afternoons.

title: JAOfilm No.6
description: Two men meet at a Parisian outdoor café. One becomes attracted to the other and they relocate to a park.

title: TheBoys No.11
description: In a quiet apartment in Warsaw, a local barber sheds layers of reserve. Candid, sensual, unapologetically intimate.

title: TheBoys No.10
description: A performer in a Berlin cruising park, enjoying attention under open sky.

title: TheBoys No.9
description: A portrait filmed during Pride in Taipei. Visiting from New York, he reveals quiet confidence and emotional honesty on camera.

title: TheBoys No.8
description: Following an eventful evening out, a Ukrainian visitor lingers in the afterglow of the previous night.

title: TheBoys No.5
description: An itch you need to scratch.

title: TheBoys No.4
description: Shy vulnerability and underlying pride. A man talks about himself with candor and unexpected playfulness.

title: TheBoys No.2
description: The air still thick with the scent of last night. Two bodies, same bed, morning light.

title: inappropriate BTS
description: Behind-the-scenes of the Inappropriate photo book. An old cinema. A working office. A stairwell.
